codes.UNKNOWN_ERROR: Coś poszło nie tak. Please try again shortly.
codes.NETWORK_ERROR: We could not connect do server. Please check your internet connection i try again.
codes.REQUEST_TIMEOUT: server took too long do respond. Please try again.
codes.BACKEND_HOST_UNREACHABLE: We could not reach server. Please check your internet connection i try again.
codes.SECURE_CONNECTION_FAILED: Secure connection failed. Check backend HTTPS certificate.
codes.CONFLICT: This update conflicts z newer saved clinical data
codes.VALIDATION_ERROR: Please check highlighted fields i try again.
codes.SERVER_ERROR: Coś poszło nie tak while processing your request. Please try again shortly.
codes.BACKEND_UNAVAILABLE: We could not connect do server right now. Please try again shortly.
codes.BACKEND_ENDPOINT_NOT_FOUND: Backend API endpoint was not found. domain is reachable, but API route is not deployed.
codes.RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND: requested record could not be found. Please Odśwież i try again.
codes.ADMISSION_NOT_FOUND: admission record could not be found. Please return do Śledzenie i try again.
codes.BACKEND_METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED: Backend endpoint exists but does not accept this request.
codes.BACKEND_INVALID_RESPONSE: Backend returned an invalid sign-in response. It may be serving website instead of API.
codes.SESSION_STORAGE_FAILED: We could not zapisz your sign-in session. Please try again.
codes.RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests. Wait a moment i try again.
codes.ROUTE_ERROR: An Błąd occurred while Ładowanie this page
codes.INVALID_CREDENTIALS: Invalid e-mail lub Hasło. Please check your details i try again.
codes.MULTIPLE_TENANTS: Multiple tenants found. Please wybierz a tenant.
codes.SESSION_EXPIRED: Your session expired. Zaloguj się again do kontynuuj.
codes.USER_EXISTS: This e-mail is already registered. Please sign in instead.
codes.AI_UNAUTHORIZED: AI API key invalid lub expired
codes.HOME_SUMMARY_INVALID: Strona główna summary response is invalid
codes.HOME_SUMMARY_LOAD_FAILED: Nie można wczytać Strona główna summary
codes.ADMISSION_SAVE_FAILED: Nie można zapisać admission record. Sprawdź połączenie i spróbuj ponownie
codes.ADMISSION_VALIDATION_FAILED: Some wymagane admission details are missing. Please Przegląd highlighted fields.
codes.ADMISSION_RECOMMENDATION_FAILED: Unable do generate clinical recommendations right now. You can still Przegląd i zapisz admission.
codes.VENTILATION_SESSION_DRAFT_LOAD_FAILED: Nie można wczytać admission form. Sprawdź połączenie i spróbuj ponownie
codes.VENTILATION_SESSION_DRAFT_SAVE_FAILED: Nie można zapisać local admission draft. Please try again

capture.title: Dataset capture
capture.governanceNotice: Captured candidates are submitted dla reviewer approval only. Raw pasted notes are not stored in approved datasets lub sent do external model services.
capture.roleBlocked: Dataset candidate capture requires an approved clinical write rola.
capture.offlineNotice: Offline submissions are w kolejce z structured fields only i sync when connectivity returns.
capture.notePlaceholder: Paste a de-identified bedside note, then Przegląd structured fields before submitting.
capture.facilityMissing: Wybierz lub sign in do one active Placówka before submitting.
capture.noteRequired: Paste a note before creating a preview.
capture.identifierWarning: Identifier-like text was detected. It is not included in structured Przegląd payload.
capture.trainingApprovalAvailable: Training approval controls remain in governed Przegląd workflows.

privacy.title: Prywatność
privacy.localStorageDescription: Preferences i session data are stored only on this device. Brakthing is sent do external servers.
privacy.optionalAI: If online AI features are enabled, those requests may be sent do configured services.

about.title: Informacje
about.prototypeScope: This is a prototype dla reference i training. Brakt dla clinical use.

safety.title: Clinical safety
safety.body: AI Vent provides documentation support i advisory safety prompts only. It does not replace clinical judgment, issue treatment orders, lub determine respirator ustawienia.
safety.secondary: Confirm all decisions against pacjent, your Placówka workflow, i local clinical protocol.
safety.acknowledgeLabel: I understand this is advisory decision support only
safety.acknowledgeHint: Wymagane before continuing do clinical workflows
safety.syncDeferred: Safety acknowledgement is saved on this device i will be zsynchronizowano when backend authentication is available.

clinicalSafety.title: Use as advisory support
clinicalSafety.body: Przegląd safety note before using AI Vent. app can highlight missing data i uncertainty, but a qualified clinician remains responsible dla pacjent care decisions.

facilityWorkflow.title: Stay in Placówka context
facilityWorkflow.body: Use active Placówka i rola shown by your session. Keep records within correct Placówka workflow i follow local escalation, Przegląd, i approval procedures.

inputs.title: Wprowadźing inputs
inputs.body: Use Przyjmij do Wprowadź available clinical parameters (SpO2, PaO2, PaCO2, pH, respiratory rate, etc.). Opcjonalne ABG values improve confidence when available, but missing opcjonalne data should be reviewed as uncertainty rather than treated as a zapisz blocker.

recommendations.title: Interpreting recommendations
recommendations.body: Recommendations Pokaż advisory respirator setting references z a confidence tier. Match quality reflects how well dataset cases align z your inputs. Use matched cases as reference only i verify against clinical judgment.

monitoring.title: Monitorowanie i alerts
monitoring.body: After reviewing a zalecenie, use Monitorowanie do log vitals i labs over time. Alerts highlight values outside set thresholds i should be assessed according do local protocol.

offline.title: Offline behavior
offline.body: Core workflow (Przyjmij, advisory summaries, monitorowanie) works offline. Data is saved locally. Opcjonalne AI features require connectivity. When wstecz online, kontynuuj as normalne.

glossary.PEEP: Positive end-expiratory pressure (cmH₂O). Maintains lung volume i oxygenation.
glossary.FiO2: Fraction of inspired oxygen (0–1). Percentage of oxygen in inspired gas.
glossary.IERatio: I:E ratio. Inspiratory do expiratory time ratio (e.g. 1:2).
glossary.tidalVolume: Objętość oddechowa (mL). Volume delivered per breath.
glossary.PaCO2: Partial pressure of arterial carbon dioxide (mmHg).
glossary.ABG: Arterial blood gas values such as PaO2, PaCO2, i pH, tied do a sample time.
glossary.referenceStatus: Governance i verification state dla a reference range. Only active approved lub verified ranges are eligible dla active decision-support display.
glossary.datasetCapture: Candidate de-identified records that need Przegląd before dataset lub training use.
glossary.reviewQueue: A work queue dla Przegląd decisions, corrections, exclusions, i audit reasons.
glossary.syncState: Current offline, online, lub syncing state. Clinical records may still need later sync.
glossary.shadowMode: Governed model evaluation mode where outputs remain hidden z normalne clinical workflows.

missingABG.title: Missing ABG values
missingABG.body: Recommendations work without ABG; Wprowadź SpO₂ i inne vitals when available. dla better matching, dodaj PaO₂, PaCO₂, i pH when you have them.

offline.title: Using app offline
offline.body: Przyjmij, advisory summaries, i monitorowanie work offline. Data is stored locally. Opcjonalne AI suggestions require internet. Sync is not wymagane dla core workflow.

unverifiedReference.title: Reference range is not active
unverifiedReference.body: Draft, Oczekujące, retired, rejected, i unverified ranges are not eligible dla active decision-support display. Przegląd source, version, scope, i verification status.

roleRestrictedModelHelp.title: Model-readiness pomoc is restricted
roleRestrictedModelHelp.body: Predictive model readiness i shadow-mode details are visible only do approved governance roles. Brakrmal clinical workflows do not expose model internals.

needsReview.title: Record needs Przegląd
needsReview.body: Use Przegląd queue do check submitted data, request correction, Zatwierdź eligible records, lub wyklucz records z an audit Powód.

guides.home: Przegląd Placówka context, sync state, active admissions, red flags, i records needing Przegląd before opening a pacjent workflow.
guides.admit: Capture pacjent pathway i available clinical values. Mark unavailable data clearly i Przegląd backend-confirmed calculations after zapisz.
guides.tracking: Use Śledzenie do scan recent ventilation status i Przegląd needs. Read trend flags z source data i local protocol context.
guides.abgVentUpdate: Add new ABG results and ventilator settings as time-stamped records so earlier values remain available for review.
guides.datasetCapture: Use dataset capture dla de-identified candidate records. Human Przegląd is wymagane before approved training-data use.
guides.reviewQueue: Use Przegląd queue do Zatwierdź, request correction, lub wyklucz records while preserving audit trail.
guides.dashboard: Use dashboards dla aggregate quality, Przegląd, reference, i governance status. Avoid pacjent identifiers in governance summaries.
guides.settings: Use ustawienia dla konto, Placówka, accessibility, Prywatność, sync, i reference visibility preferences where authorized.
guides.hypoxemia: Przegląd FiO₂ i PEEP; consider recruitment; check dla shunt lub V/Q mismatch.
guides.hypercapnia: Przegląd minute ventilation (rate × tidal volume); consider permissive hypercapnia per protocol.
guides.acidosis: Address ventilation i perfusion; correct underlying cause per protocol.
guides.general: Use recommendations as decision support only. Validate against local protocols i clinical judgment.

ai.label: Wsparcie decyzji AI
ai.enableHint: Use online AI dla complex cases only; local recommendations always available
ai.providerHint: AI provider (e.g. OpenAI); API key is per provider

observations.title: Additional observations
observations.description: Record any extra clinical data not covered above (e.g. labs, imaging, medications, comorbidity scores). Each observation is a single Imię i nazwisko–value pair. Opcjonalne; you can skip this step.

timeSeries.title: Time series (vital signs over time)
timeSeries.description: Track vital signs lub inne metrics at multiple time points (e.g. SpO₂, RR, HR at 0h, 1h, 2h). Used dla trend analysis i monitorowanie after you start session. Opcjonalne; you can dodaj points later on monitorowanie screen.
